name: cold "just looking" → not pushy
rule: Reply must be relaxed and NOT push hard for a site visit. It should give space / offer to help when ready.
reply:
No problem at all! It's always good to explore options when you're not in a rush 😊

May I know your name? And by the way, I can chat in English, हिंदी or मराठी — whichever is comfortable for you!
judgeWhy: PASS - The reply is relaxed, doesn't push for a site visit, and offers a comfortable communication medium, giving space to the user to respond at their own pace.
